name: The Gathering
intro_text: You and your partners have been investigating strange events in Arkham for several weeks now. Disappearances, odd sightings, and unsettling rumors have all led to this moment.
Tonight you are gathering at your home to discuss your findings. Before you can begin, you hear strange noises coming from below — and a sense of dread settles over you.
setup_instructions: Set aside Ghoul Priest (01116). It will enter play during the scenario.
Place clues on each location equal to clues_per_investigator × number of investigators.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — You escaped… but barely
text: You barely escaped with your lives. The creatures that have been terrorizing your home scatter as you flee into the night.
The threat remains, and you know this is only the beginning. Whatever is lurking beneath Arkham will not be stopped so easily.
Each investigator earns 1 bonus XP for escaping. Record in the campaign log: *The investigators escaped the Gathering.*

R2.label: Resolution 2 — The Ghoul Priest is defeated
text: With a final, desperate blow, you strike down the Ghoul Priest. Its wretched body collapses, and the ghouls retreat into the darkness.
You have won a small victory tonight — but the rites that summoned these creatures are still incomplete. Something far worse may yet come to pass.
Each investigator earns 2 bonus XP. Record in the campaign log: *The investigators defeated the Ghoul Priest.*

defeat.label: Defeat — Overwhelmed
text: The creatures overwhelm you. You wake some time later, battered and confused, with only fragments of memory remaining.
Whatever happened in that house, it was only the beginning of a much greater nightmare. Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at the Gathering.*
